name: pecharunt
flavor_texts: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.
Its peach-shaped shell serves as storage for a potent poison. It makes poisonous mochi and serves them to people and Pokémon.
text: Pecharunt is the Subjugation Pokémon. It is a poison and ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: poison-puppeteer. Base stats — HP: 88, Attack: 88, Defense: 160, Sp. Atk: 88, Sp. Def: 88, Speed: 88. Evolution line: pecharunt. Lore: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will. Its peach-shaped shell serves as storage for a potent poison. It makes poisonous mochi and serves them to people and Pokémon.
